verified.title: Email Verified!
verified.message: Your account is now fully active. You can safely close this tab and return to your dashboard to claim your territories.

step.2: Click "I've verified it" on your dashboard

message.invalid-link: Invalid verification link. The code is missing or malformed.
message.invalid-action-code: This link is invalid or has already been used.
message.user-disabled: This user account has been disabled.
message.default: An unexpected error occurred while verifying your email.

step.2: Return to your original dashboard tab
step.3: Click "Resend Email" to get a new link

reset-password.title: Create New Password
reset-password.helper: Please enter a new password for your account.

error.invalid: Invalid or missing password reset code.
error.expired: This reset link has expired or was already used. Please request a new one.
error.length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
error.default: An unexpected error occurred while resetting your password. Please try again.

success.title: Your password has been successfully reset!

forgot-password.description: Enter your account email address and we will send you a secure link to reset your password.

email-required.title: Email Required
email-required.message: Please enter an email address to reset your password.

reset-failed.title: Reset Failed
reset-failed.message: Failed to send reset link. Please check the email and try again.

success.title: Check your inbox
success.message: We've sent a password reset link to {email}
